mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bible_verses WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND chapter_number = #{chapter} ORDER BY verse_number

SELECT * FROM bible_verses WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND ( (chapter_number = #{startChapter} AND verse_number >= #{startVerse}) OR (chapter_number > #{startChapter} AND chapter_number < #{endChapter}) OR (chapter_number = #{endChapter} AND verse_number <= #{endVerse}) ) ORDER BY chapter_number, verse_number
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bible_verses WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND chapter_number = #{chapter}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bible_verses WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT DISTINCT chapter_number FROM bible_verses WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY chapter_number
